allowed_inbound_streams: thin-client SQL or cache data stream; schema plus cache entries when compatibility profile exposes logical export
allowed_outbound_streams: schema plus cache/table data stream to client; query scoped export
denied_inbound: cluster snapshots; WAL or persistence-store restore; server-local file imports
denied_outbound: cluster snapshots; persistence-store files; server-local export paths
parser_role: parse stream frames and lower schema/data operations only
engine_authority: MGA transaction inventory; catalog UUID mapping; security policy; cache/table apply finality
notes: Full stream support is conditional on a compatibility-compatible logical schema and data stream profile; Ignite snapshot behavior remains external authority.

allowed_inbound_streams: cqlsh SOURCE stream; cqlsh COPY FROM STDIN style table data; schema CQL stream
allowed_outbound_streams: schema CQL stream; cqlsh COPY TO STDOUT style table data
denied_inbound: nodetool snapshot restore; SSTable loader; server-local COPY path; repair or rebuild storage
denied_outbound: nodetool snapshot; SSTable files; server-local COPY path
parser_role: parse CQL/script/data streams and lower to SBLR only
engine_authority: MGA finality; keyspace/table catalog mapping; consistency policy
notes: Full database backup is composed from schema plus table streams only when the compatibility profile declares that composition.

allowed_inbound_streams: INSERT FORMAT remote data stream; SQL DDL stream for metadata
allowed_outbound_streams: SELECT FORMAT remote data stream; SHOW CREATE derived metadata stream
denied_inbound: BACKUP RESTORE to disk/object storage; ATTACH from external storage; table functions reading server files
denied_outbound: BACKUP to disk/object storage; INTO OUTFILE; file/url/s3/hdfs table-function writes when server-side authority is required
parser_role: translate logical FORMAT blocks and DDL; never execute BACKUP RESTORE storage authority
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog mapping; import/export policy; external connector policy
notes: ClickHouse BACKUP/RESTORE statements remain denied unless reclassified as a purely remote logical stream by a compatibility-specific proof.

allowed_inbound_streams: SQL dump stream; COPY FROM STDIN stream; schema plus row stream
allowed_outbound_streams: SQL dump stream; COPY TO STDOUT stream; selected database/schema/table stream
denied_inbound: BACKUP RESTORE external storage commands; IMPORT from server path or object store
denied_outbound: BACKUP external storage commands; EXPORT server/object-store targets
parser_role: parse PostgreSQL-compatible logical stream and lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; serializable retry policy; catalog UUID mapping; security policy
notes: CockroachDB-native BACKUP and RESTORE are storage authority and stay denied; logical SQL/COPY streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: SQL dump restore stream; data diff or table stream when compatibility-compatible; remote pull/fetch logical sync through Dolt UDR
allowed_outbound_streams: SQL dump stream; selected database/table/revision logical stream; remote push logical sync through Dolt UDR
denied_inbound: repository storage clone that creates server-local files; filesystem import; parser-owned repository effects
denied_outbound: repository backup; clone as server-local file effect; filesystem export; parser-owned repository effects
parser_role: translate SQL/versioned logical records and route compatibility remote sync to the Dolt UDR only
engine_authority: MGA finality; version metadata mapping; catalog UUID mapping
notes: Dolt version, diff, and remote sync metadata may be preserved as logical evidence; repository storage authority remains denied outside UDR policy.

allowed_inbound_streams: SQL script stream; COPY FROM STDIN; remote logical CSV/JSON/Parquet block stream when client supplied
allowed_outbound_streams: SQL script stream; COPY TO STDOUT; query/table stream in compatibility format
denied_inbound: IMPORT DATABASE from server directory; ATTACH physical database file; COPY from server-local path
denied_outbound: EXPORT DATABASE to server directory; COPY to server-local path; physical database file copy
parser_role: parse COPY/script stream and lower to SBLR; format-decode client blocks only
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog mapping; datatype conversion; import/export policy
notes: DuckDB database-file and directory export commands are denied; logical stream equivalents are allowed.

allowed_inbound_streams: gbak remote service restore stream; metadata-only stream; data stream; compatibility service stream over client connection
allowed_outbound_streams: gbak remote service backup stream; metadata-only or data-filtered compatibility-supported stream
denied_inbound: nbackup; page-copy backup; server-local backup path; raw database file restore
denied_outbound: nbackup; page-copy backup; server-local backup path; raw database file backup
parser_role: parse gbak/service records and lower metadata/data operations to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog UUID mapping; blob/array restoration; security policy; commit boundary
notes: Classic gbak logical stream is allowed; nbackup and on-disk page-copy formats are always denied.

allowed_inbound_streams: client key-range restore stream; tuple/directory-layer logical records
allowed_outbound_streams: client key-range export stream; directory/subspace scoped stream
denied_inbound: backup agent restore; snapshot files; cluster DR file sets
denied_outbound: backup agent output; snapshot files; cluster DR file sets
parser_role: parse key/value stream and directory metadata only
engine_authority: MGA finality; keyspace mapping; directory metadata policy
notes: FoundationDB backup-agent artifacts are not parser authority; client key-range streams may be admitted.

allowed_inbound_streams: verified SQL/KV logical restore stream; transaction proof records when client supplied
allowed_outbound_streams: verified SQL/KV logical backup stream; transaction proof records to client
denied_inbound: file dump restore; server-local dump path; external replication file state
denied_outbound: file dump; server-local export path; external replication file state
parser_role: parse verified logical records and proof metadata; lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; proof rendering policy; catalog/security mapping
notes: Proof material is evidence only; ScratchBird MGA remains finality authority.

allowed_inbound_streams: line protocol stream; annotated CSV stream; bucket-scoped logical write stream
allowed_outbound_streams: line protocol or annotated CSV query/export stream
denied_inbound: engine backup restore files; shard files; server-local import paths
denied_outbound: engine backup files; shard files; server-local export paths
parser_role: parse line protocol/CSV and lower points/schema operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; measurement/bucket mapping; retention policy
notes: Influx backup artifacts are denied; logical point streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: mysqldump SQL restore stream; LOAD DATA LOCAL client stream; schema plus row stream
allowed_outbound_streams: mysqldump SQL stream; selected database/table stream; SELECT result stream
denied_inbound: server-local LOAD DATA INFILE; LOAD_FILE; backup stage physical effects
denied_outbound: SELECT INTO OUTFILE/DUMPFILE; server-local backup stage file effects
parser_role: parse SQL and LOCAL data streams; lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog/security mapping; datatype conversion
notes: LOCAL/client-stream data is allowed; server-local file access remains denied.

allowed_inbound_streams: client vector/collection entity stream; schema/index metadata stream when compatibility API exposes it
allowed_outbound_streams: client collection/query vector stream; schema/index metadata stream
denied_inbound: object-store backup restore; segment files; server-local bulk load paths
denied_outbound: object-store backup; segment files; server-local export paths
parser_role: parse vector/entity stream and lower collection/index/data operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; vector/index rebuild policy; collection mapping
notes: Milvus backup-tool artifacts are denied; logical entity/vector streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: mongorestore archive stream; BSON document stream; selected database/collection stream
allowed_outbound_streams: mongodump archive stream; BSON document stream; selected database/collection/query stream
denied_inbound: server-local dump directory; filesystem snapshot; replica set storage restore
denied_outbound: server-local dump directory; filesystem snapshot; storage backup
parser_role: parse BSON/archive documents and lower collection/index/data operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; BSON datatype conversion; index/catalog mapping; security policy
notes: Archive/stdin/stdout style logical streams are allowed; server-side dump paths are denied.

allowed_inbound_streams: mysqldump SQL restore stream; LOAD DATA LOCAL client stream; schema plus row stream
allowed_outbound_streams: mysqldump SQL stream; selected database/table stream; SELECT result stream
denied_inbound: server-local LOAD DATA INFILE; LOAD_FILE; clone plugin; physical backup artifacts
denied_outbound: SELECT INTO OUTFILE/DUMPFILE; server-local export path; clone plugin physical backup
parser_role: parse SQL and LOCAL data streams; lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog/security mapping; datatype conversion
notes: Client LOCAL streams are allowed; server-local file access and clone/physical backup are denied.

allowed_inbound_streams: Cypher script restore stream; CSV client stream where compatibility-compatible; graph entity stream
allowed_outbound_streams: Cypher script backup stream; query result stream; graph entity stream
denied_inbound: neo4j-admin dump/load; server-local LOAD CSV path; store files
denied_outbound: neo4j-admin dump; store files; server-local export paths
parser_role: parse Cypher/data stream and lower graph operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; graph identity mapping; index rebuild policy
notes: Admin dump/load is storage authority; remote logical Cypher/entity streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: _bulk restore stream; mappings/settings stream; selected index/document stream
allowed_outbound_streams: _bulk export stream; scroll/search result stream; selected index/document stream
denied_inbound: snapshot repository restore; server-local repository paths
denied_outbound: snapshot repository backup; server-local repository paths
parser_role: parse REST JSON bulk/mapping streams and lower document/index operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; document/index mapping; security policy
notes: Snapshot repositories are external authority; bulk JSON streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: SQL/PPL selected-result restore script only when compatibility profile defines logical apply; _bulk stream via OpenSearch profile
allowed_outbound_streams: SQL/PPL query result stream; selected index/document export through approved bridge
denied_inbound: snapshot repository restore; server-local repository paths
denied_outbound: snapshot repository backup; server-local repository paths
parser_role: parse SQL/PPL stream intent and route to OpenSearch logical stream bridge
engine_authority: MGA finality; document/index mapping; security policy
notes: SQL/PPL is a query dialect; full restore requires the OpenSearch bulk stream bridge.

allowed_inbound_streams: pg_restore custom/plain logical stream; psql SQL stream; COPY FROM STDIN stream
allowed_outbound_streams: pg_dump custom/plain logical stream; selected database/schema/table stream; COPY TO STDOUT stream
denied_inbound: server-local COPY FROM path; COPY PROGRAM; basebackup; tablespace files
denied_outbound: server-local COPY TO path; COPY PROGRAM; pg_basebackup; tablespace files
parser_role: parse pg_dump/pg_restore/COPY logical stream and lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog UUID mapping; security policy; transaction grouping
notes: Logical dump streams are allowed; physical basebackup and server-local files are denied.

allowed_inbound_streams: RESP command stream; DUMP/RESTORE per-key stream; key-filtered logical stream
allowed_outbound_streams: RESP command stream; SCAN plus DUMP per-key stream; key-filtered logical stream
denied_inbound: RDB file restore; AOF file load; server-local module file manipulation
denied_outbound: SAVE/BGSAVE RDB file; AOF rewrite file; server-local dump files
parser_role: parse RESP/key streams and lower key operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; keyspace mapping; TTL/persistence policy
notes: DUMP/RESTORE payloads are allowed as remote key-value logical records; RDB/AOF files are denied.

allowed_inbound_streams: .read SQL restore stream; .dump SQL stream restore; selected-table logical stream where compatibility CLI exposes it
allowed_outbound_streams: .dump SQL stream; selected-table .dump stream; query result stream
denied_inbound: .restore database file; online backup API; ATTACH external database file
denied_outbound: .backup database file; serialize database file; VACUUM INTO; server-local database copy
parser_role: parse SQL dump stream and lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog mapping; datatype conversion
notes: SQLite page/database-copy APIs are denied; SQL dump streams are allowed.

allowed_inbound_streams: MySQL-compatible SQL restore stream; LOAD DATA LOCAL client stream; Dumpling logical stream when client supplied
allowed_outbound_streams: MySQL-compatible SQL dump stream; selected database/table stream; Dumpling logical stream to client
denied_inbound: BR RESTORE; external storage restore; server-local LOAD DATA INFILE
denied_outbound: BR BACKUP; external storage backup; server-local export paths
parser_role: parse MySQL-compatible logical stream and lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog/security mapping; placement metadata policy
notes: TiDB BR backup/restore is denied; MySQL-compatible logical streams are allowed.

allowed_inbound_streams: client key/value range restore stream; raw or transactional KV records when compatibility profile exposes them
allowed_outbound_streams: client key/value range backup stream; selected range stream
denied_inbound: BR restore; SST file ingest; raft/log snapshot restore
denied_outbound: BR backup; SST files; raft/log snapshots
parser_role: parse KV range records and lower key/value operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; key-range mapping; transaction policy
notes: TiKV physical backup and SST ingest are denied; logical client KV streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: MySQL-compatible SQL restore stream through VTGate; LOAD DATA LOCAL client stream
allowed_outbound_streams: MySQL-compatible SQL dump stream through VTGate; selected keyspace/table stream
denied_inbound: tablet backup restore; vtctl physical/topology restore; server-local file import
denied_outbound: tablet backup; vtctl physical backup; server-local file export
parser_role: parse VTGate/MySQL logical stream and lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; vSchema/keyspace mapping; topology policy
notes: VTGate logical streams are allowed; tablet backup/topology authority is not parser authority.

allowed_inbound_streams: SQL/Datalog transaction stream; document EDN/Transit logical stream; tx-log logical records when compatibility profile exposes them
allowed_outbound_streams: SQL/Datalog/document stream; tx-log logical records to client when compatibility profile exposes them
denied_inbound: module storage restore; object-store/index-store files; server-local module state
denied_outbound: module storage backup; object-store/index-store files; server-local module state
parser_role: parse document/tx stream and lower entity operations
engine_authority: MGA finality; bitemporal mapping; document identity policy
notes: XTDB module storage is denied; logical document and transaction streams are admissible.

allowed_inbound_streams: YSQL pg_dump/pg_restore stream; YCQL/CQL logical stream; COPY FROM STDIN stream
allowed_outbound_streams: YSQL pg_dump stream; YCQL/CQL logical stream; COPY TO STDOUT stream
denied_inbound: tablet snapshot restore; external storage restore; server-local COPY path
denied_outbound: tablet snapshot backup; external storage backup; server-local COPY path
parser_role: parse PostgreSQL/CQL-compatible logical stream and lower to SBLR
engine_authority: MGA finality; catalog/keyspace/tablet metadata policy; security policy
notes: YSQL/YCQL logical streams are allowed; tablet and snapshot backup/restore is denied.
